title: Nomination Period Open for 2022 Alaska Ocean Leadership Awards
summary: The Alaska SeaLife Center is pleased to announce nominations are now open for the 2022 Alaska Ocean Leadership Awards. These awards are given annually to individuals and organizations that have made significant contributions to the awareness and sustainability of the state’s marine resources. Nomina...

title: HEA Guest Speaker at College | Drone Technology
summary: Middle College students take flight with drone course By SABINE POUX • NOV 12, 2021 Hannah Crabtree is one of nine students enrolled in the drone course. She said she’s excited about using drones to take aerial photos. CREDIT SABINE POUX/KDLL Ten years ago, you’d be hard pressed to think up more than a handful of career paths involving drones.
